title: prunus chiliangensis
intro: Prunus chiliangensis, also known as the Chinese plum or mountain apricot, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the mountainous regions of southern China and northern Myanmar. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Prunus chiliangensis include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and treating digestive issues, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark, leaves, and fruits are often used to make teas, infusions, and tonics, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
